title: carlina subacaulis
intro: Carlina subacaulis, also known as the subcaulescent carline thistle, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Carlina subacaulis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it has also been used as a component in traditional remedies and folk medicines.
